certification_band_catalog.dense_refinement_band: Reference refinement band must pass before use as oracle.
certification_band_catalog.exact_numerical_linear_algebra: Exact up to reviewed numerical linear algebra and dtype limits.
certification_band_catalog.exact_transformed_sv_dense_band: Dense transformed-SV reference and Jacobian tie-out band.
certification_band_catalog.ksc_kalman_mixture_enumeration_band: Component-enumerated finite-mixture Kalman band for the KSC target.
certification_band_catalog.p44_local_approximation_band: Existing P44 local deterministic value/score band.
certification_band_catalog.p5_pending_mc_band: Pending P5 Monte Carlo uncertainty band.

dense_refined_tiny.scope: Tiny scalar/factorized nonlinear fixtures after refinement.

dpf_p5_pending_mc_band.mean_value_error_ci: P5 must predeclare 95% CI and RMSE tolerances.
dpf_p5_pending_mc_band.score_rmse: P5 must predeclare reference-score comparison tolerance.

exact_lgssm_tight.scope: LGSSM fixture and declared parameterization only.

exact_transformed_sv_tight.scope: Exact transformed SV dense/reference rows only.

ksc_mixture_tight.scope: Finite KSC transformed-mixture target only; not native SV.

purpose: Governed target-route registry for comparing DPF value and gradient evidence against exact, approximation, diagnostic, and blocked filter routes.
registry_nonclaims: P0 does not run numerical filters.
P0 does not establish DPF value or gradient closeness.
P0 does not make HMC, production, GPU, paper-scale, or deployment claims.
Rows with implementation-contract evidence are still not oracle evidence unless a same-target reference is named.

nonclaims: Surrogate does not equal native generalized SV.

run_manifest.cpu_gpu_status: pure_python_cpu_only; CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=-1 set before validation; TensorFlow not imported
run_manifest.environment: active Python environment; observed executable is recorded in command
run_manifest.particle_counts: N/A: P0 does not run DPF filters
run_manifest.seeds: N/A: P0 is schema/governance validation only

targets.observation_law: y_t = C x_t + r_t, r_t ~ N(0,R).
targets.parameterization: theta = (transition_matrix_scale, observation_noise_scale) for DPF V2; exact Kalman may also use frozen A,C,Q,R,m0,P0.
targets.target_identity: 2D LGSSM with horizon 25 from the common V2 fixture.
target_nonclaims: No DPF closeness claim before P1/P5 multi-seed evidence.

targets.dimension_panel_convention: dims 1,2,3 are independent panel sums in the P44 fixture.
targets.observation_law: y_t | x_t ~ N(x_t + c x_t^3, R).
targets.state_law: Per-axis Gaussian AR transition with parameterized rho, q, and initial distribution.
targets.target_identity: Factorized scalar panel with linear Gaussian transition and cubic additive-Gaussian observation.

targets.dimension_panel_convention: dims 1,2,3 are independent panel sums in the P44 fixture.
targets.observation_law: y_t | x_t ~ N(x_t^2, R), producing symmetric-mode stress.
targets.state_law: Per-axis Gaussian AR transition with parameterized rho, q, and initial distribution.
targets.target_identity: Factorized scalar panel with linear Gaussian transition and quadratic observation.
target_nonclaims: CUT4 is a stress diagnostic on this target, not an oracle.

targets.dimension_panel_convention: dims 1,2,3 are independent panel sums; Zhao-Cui row is horizon-2 only.
targets.observation_law: Gaussian observation closure on the transformed state path.
targets.state_law: Per-axis nonlinear Gaussian transition from the P44-M4 fixture.
targets.target_identity: Factorized scalar panel with nonlinear transition at horizon 2.
target_nonclaims: No horizon-4 Zhao-Cui promotion for the scalar helper.

targets.dimension_panel_convention: dims 1,2,3 are independent panels, not coupled multivariate TT.
targets.parameterization: theta = (gamma, beta, sigma) in P41 test ordering.
targets.state_law: Scalar SV AR law, factorized across panel coordinates.
targets.target_identity: Exact transformed SV target z_t = log(y_t^2) with observation-only Jacobian tracked separately.
target_nonclaims: No coupled multivariate Zhao-Cui TT claim.
targets.transformation_jacobian_terms: Jacobian log|d log(y^2)/dy| is required for raw-native comparisons; exact transformed rows use z only.

targets.dimension_panel_convention: dims 1,2,3 independent panels; component enumeration scales as 7^dim on tiny fixtures.
targets.observation_law: Finite Gaussian-mixture approximation to transformed SV observations.
targets.parameterization: theta = (gamma, beta, sigma) in P40/P43 test ordering.
targets.state_law: Scalar SV AR law, factorized across panel coordinates.
targets.target_identity: Finite KSC transformed-mixture SV approximation target with component enumeration.
targets.transformation_jacobian_terms: Mixture approximation target only; not the exact transformed or raw-native SV target.

targets.dimension_panel_convention: one series has latent state (s_t,h_t); panels must be labeled factorized unless reviewed.
targets.state_law: Independent prior AR laws for s_t and h_t in the tiny fixture; posterior couples them.
targets.target_identity: Native generalized SV raw-observation likelihood y_t | s_t,h_t,beta.
target_nonclaims: No native generalized-SV exact filter claim.
targets.transformation_jacobian_terms: None for raw-y density; transformed rows are separate targets.

targets.dimension_panel_convention: factorized diagnostic panels only unless separately reviewed.
targets.observation_law: Diagnostic transformed residual with numerical square floor; not native raw-y likelihood.
targets.state_law: Same fixed independent AR laws for s_t and h_t as the P45 diagnostic fixture.
targets.target_identity: Transformed-residual diagnostic log((y_t - beta s_t)^2) - h_t.
target_nonclaims: Transformed residual is not exact native generalized SV.
targets.transformation_jacobian_terms: Exact transform is blocked because residual transform depends on latent s_t.

targets.dimension_panel_convention: factorized approximation diagnostics only unless separately reviewed.
targets.observation_law: Approximation route; residual y_t - beta s_t remains state-dependent.
targets.state_law: Fixed independent prior AR laws for s_t and h_t unless later amended.
targets.target_identity: Gaussian-mixture or moment-matched approximation row for generalized SV diagnostics.
target_nonclaims: Gaussian mixture is not exact native generalized SV.
targets.transformation_jacobian_terms: Must state whether it approximates log-chi-square residuals or raw conditional variance.

targets.dimension_panel_convention: J=1 first; J=2,3 are factorized or replicated unless reviewed.
targets.observation_law: Gaussian observation noise on infectious coordinates.
targets.parameterization: theta = (initial_S_shift, initial_I_shift, log_process_scale, log_observation_scale) for J=1 diagnostic closure.
targets.state_law: P44/P45 closure transition with Gaussian process noise around the SIR mean map.
targets.target_identity: Clean-room additive-Gaussian spatial-SIR closure with infectious-coordinate observations.
target_nonclaims: Closure likelihood is not native SIR filtering correctness.
targets.transformation_jacobian_terms: No observation transform; negative-state policy must stay fixed across methods.

targets.dimension_panel_convention: Not authorized for comparison until a target-definition amendment passes review.
targets.observation_law: Unspecified native or non-Gaussian observation law.
targets.target_identity: Native or non-Gaussian spatial-SIR likelihood route if later proposed.
target_nonclaims: No native SIR likelihood correctness claim.

targets.dimension_panel_convention: Two-state target first; replicated panels are factorized unless reviewed.
targets.observation_law: Gaussian observation noise on prey and predator coordinates.
targets.parameterization: theta = (r,K,a,s,u,v) for the tiny closure fixture.
targets.state_law: P44/P45 RK4 transition mean plus Gaussian process noise.
targets.target_identity: Tiny additive-Gaussian RK4 predator-prey closure with state (prey,predator).
target_nonclaims: Closure likelihood is not paper-scale predator-prey validation.
targets.transformation_jacobian_terms: No observation transform; RK4 and positivity diagnostics must stay fixed.

targets.dimension_panel_convention: Not authorized for comparison until a target-definition amendment passes review.
targets.target_identity: Native or non-Gaussian predator-prey route if later proposed.
target_nonclaims: No native predator-prey likelihood correctness claim.
